message:
Replace hand-rolled WebSocket with standard WebSocket API for Bun compatibility

The WebSocketClient class used Node's http.request upgrade event which Bun
doesn't support, causing connections to hang. Replaced with the standard
WebSocket API available natively in both Bun and modern Node.

Also fixed the navigate() function which had a race condition: it sent
Page.enable on the pooled connection but listened for Page.loadEventFired on a
separate connection. Now sends Page.enable and Page.navigate on the same
connection that listens for the load event. Replaced http.request in
chromeHttpAt() with fetch() for the same Bun compatibility reason.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
